src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ / Spring Boot 3 environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.2.1 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.* packages); code using javax.* or running on older Spring Boot will fail to compile or start.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2.x targets Java 21 features and optimizations; while it may run on 17, the project intent is to migrate to JDK 21, and some dependencies may require it.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new com.mysql:mysql-connector-j artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old mysql-connector-java artifact is deprecated and removed in newer versions; the new artifact is required for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x and modern JDBC drivers.
